zh.Adlington, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓
zh.Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Legh於1447年1月9日出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington36歲，母親Isabell Stanley36歲。她於大約1467年與William Davenport I在英國爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年1月10日在英國爾布盧哈爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Adlington, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾阿德林頓
zh-hans.Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Legh于1447年1月9日出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington36岁，母亲Isabell Stanley36岁。她于大约1467年与William Davenport I在英国爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年1月10日在英国爾布盧哈爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Legh was born on 9 January 1447, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, was 36 and her mother, Isabell Stanley, was 36. She married William Davenport I about 1467, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 10 January 1500, in Broomhall, Cheshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Legh est née le 9 janvier 1447, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabell Stanley, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé William Davenport I environ 1467, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1500, à Broomhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Legh am 9. Januar 1447 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington 36 und ihre Mutter Isabell Stanley 36. Sie hat um 1467 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England William Davenport I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1500 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Broomhall, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Legh è nata il il 9 gennaio 1447 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Isabell Stanley, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato William Davenport I circa 1467, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1500, nel Broomhall, Cheshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Broomhall, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアブルームハル
ja.Adlington, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントン
ja.Lancashire, Lancashire, England, United: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Prestbury, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリー
ja.Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United King: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハル
ja.lifeSummary: Margery Leghが1447年1月9日にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonは36歳，母Isabell Stanleyは36歳であった。約1467年にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでWilliam Davenport Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年1月10日にイギリスチェシュアイアブルームハルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Legh(이)가 1447년 1월 9일 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Stanley(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1467년 영국 체실르 프레스트버이에서 William Davenport I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 1월 10일 영국 체실르 브룸홀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.9 January 1447–10 January 1500: 1447 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 9–1500 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 10

pt.9 January 1447–10 January 1500: 9 de janeiro de 1447–10 de janeiro de 1500
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Legh nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1447, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Stanley, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com William Davenport I aproximadamente 1467, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1500, em Broomhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Legh родилась 9 января 1447 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Stanley, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Davenport I около 1467 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 10 января 1500 г. в местности брумхолл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.9 January 1447–10 January 1500: 9 de enero de 1447–10 de enero de 1500
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Legh nació el 9 de enero de 1447, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabell Stanley, tenía 36 años. Se casó con William Davenport I aproximadamente 1467, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1500, en Broomhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
